name: p3_cold_day_heat_floor_band
description: Issue #249 P3: On a cold day with a dual-setpoint thermostat, classification arms the occupied comfort band [comfort_heat / comfort_cool] in heat_cool mode with active=floor, defending the heat floor.
notes: (a) Scenario effectiveness: if _apply_comfort_band is removed from apply_classification on cold day,
comfort_band_armed fails; if band floor is set to setback_heat (62) instead of comfort_heat (70),
expect_band floor check fails — the thermostat would let indoor drop 8F below comfort before heating.
(b) Docs↔production alignment: cold day arms the full comfort band [comfort_heat, comfort_cool] with
active=floor (occupied+awake uses the full comfort band on any day type). See docs/08 §6e.
(c) Occupant experience: if the floor were set to setback_heat (62F) instead of comfort_heat (70F),
the occupant could wake to a house 8F below their comfort setting — the regression guard here
Regression proof: change select_comfort_band(cold day) to use setback_heat as floor →

events.note: Cold morning: indoor 68F below comfort_heat=70F. Heating needed.
Cold-day classification: hvac_mode=heat. P3: band [comfort_heat=70 / comfort_cool=76] armed with active=floor.

assertions.reason: Cold-day classification fires; comfort band armed to defend the heat floor.
P3 guard: _apply_comfort_band must fire on cold day. If missing, the thermostat is left without a refreshed setpoint — heat floor undefended, occupant wakes to cold house.

Occupied+awake uses the full comfort band [comfort_heat=70, comfort_cool=76] on any day type. Floor must be comfort_heat=70 (not setback_heat=62) so the occupant does not wake 8F below comfort; ceiling stays at comfort_cool=76 (not setback_cool=82).

verdict.summary: P3 cold-day classification arms the dual comfort band [70/76] with active=floor — the thermostat defends the comfort_heat floor autonomously
verdict.observed_behavior: classification_applied; comfort_band_applied [floor=70, ceiling=76, active=floor, mode=dual]; set_hvac_mode(heat_cool) + set_temperature(low=70, high=76)
verdict.expected_behavior: Occupant wakes to a home held at/above 70F (comfort_heat); the thermostat self-manages the band without periodic CA override.
